configuration.subtitle: There is a problem with the server configuration. Check the settings or contact an administrator.

verification.subtitle: The sign-in link is invalid or has already been used.

oauthSignin.title: Sign-in error

oauthCallback.title: Sign-in error

oauthCreateAccount.title: Account error
oauthCreateAccount.subtitle: Could not create an account through the authorization provider.

emailCreateAccount.title: Account error
emailCreateAccount.subtitle: Could not create an account with this email.

callback.title: Sign-in error
callback.subtitle: An error occurred while processing the authorization response.

oauthAccountNotLinked.title: Account not linked
oauthAccountNotLinked.subtitle: This email is already associated with a different sign-in method.

sessionRequired.title: Sign-in required
sessionRequired.subtitle: You need to sign in to access this page.

default.title: Sign-in error

deviceAuth.description: Confirm the one-time code from your local smart home server.
deviceAuth.signInRequired: You need to sign in before confirming the code.

messages.confirmed: Code confirmed. You can return to local app and continue authorization.

toasts.confirmOnPage: Confirm the authorization code on this page.
toasts.confirmed: Code confirmed. Return to the local app.

errors.signInRequired: Sign in first to confirm this code.
errors.confirmFailed: Failed to confirm code. Please try again.

errors.invitationAlreadyProcessed: Invitation was already accepted or revoked
errors.invitationTryAccept: You can still try to accept the invitation below.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageDescription: API gateway, appearance and language preferences.

gateway.title: API Gateway
gateway.description: Cloud and local backends connect through a single api-gateway entry point.
gateway.accessService: access-service (houses, members, device catalog, device auth)
gateway.localBackendHint: Local servers reach the cloud via /api/access and /api/scenario. Per-house Zigbee MQTT is configured separately in house settings (direct Mosquitto URL, not /api/mqtt).

home.title: Domovoy
home.subtitle: Control your home with ease
home.description: Welcome to your smart home dashboard. Manage all your devices and rooms from one place.

dashboard.noHousesCreate: No houses yet. Create one to get started.
dashboard.title: Dashboard

errors.scenarioServiceUnavailable: The scenario service is unavailable, so part of the dashboard data could not be loaded.

widgets.floorPlanEmptyHint: Open the floor plan editor in the admin panel and place devices on the map.
widgets.tipBody: Dim warm lights in the evening — it helps you unwind before sleep.

hero.description: Domovoy combines cloud and an on-site server: manage Zigbee and Modbus, grant permissions down to a single device function, and run multiple sites from one account — without industrial SCADA budgets.

problem.title: Why common platforms fall short
problem.description: Cloud ecosystems, DIY hubs, and SCADA each solve part of the puzzle — not the full stack small businesses and country homes need.

marketItems.cloud: Cloud services stop when the internet drops
marketItems.diy: Home Assistant fits one home — no granular rights or multi-site control
marketItems.scada: Industrial SCADA is overkill for a café, office, or cottage

solutionItems.hybrid: Hybrid mode: the edge server keeps the site running; the cloud keeps the big picture
solutionItems.access: RBAC + ABAC: permissions down to device functions, expiry dates, deny wins over allow
solutionItems.protocols: Zigbee and Modbus RTU/TCP together — no vendor lock-in

features.title: Built for operations, not slide decks
features.description: From the device catalog to scenarios and access control — one platform instead of a patchwork of apps.

hybrid.title: Works without the internet
hybrid.description: The on-site server keeps controlling devices; when connectivity returns, changes sync to the cloud.

access.title: Permissions per device function
access.description: Security sees cameras, staff control lighting in their zone, guests only what you allow. Explicit deny always wins.

protocols.title: Zigbee and Modbus together
protocols.description: Sensors, sockets, HVAC, and industrial gear in one loop — without closed ecosystems.

multisite.title: Many sites, one account
multisite.description: Cottage, office, and retail location under one login — no account switching.

realtime.title: Live device status
realtime.description: Telemetry via MQTT and Socket.IO: the floor plan shows what is on and where something failed.

ai.title: AI scenarios on your network
ai.description: A local model suggests automations from your device mix — data never leaves your infrastructure.

audiences.title: Who Domovoy is for
audiences.description: For teams that cannot afford SCADA but outgrow boxed clouds and DIY hubs.

home.title: Country homes and cottages
home.description: Stay autonomous on unstable internet; family and staff get different permission sets.

office.title: Small business offices
office.description: Coworkings and small teams: zones, staff roles, climate and lighting.

retail.title: Retail and services
retail.description: Cafés, salons, shops: energy use, guest comfort, and security in one place.

warehouse.title: Warehouses and light industry
warehouse.description: Modbus for industrial equipment without deploying full SCADA.

architecture.title: Three layers — one interface
architecture.description: The same web client talks to cloud and local server: switching modes does not break familiar screens.

cloud.title: Cloud
cloud.description: Access and automation microservices, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Keycloak — scale and central control.

edge.title: Local server
edge.description: Rust, SQLite, Zigbee2MQTT and Modbus on site — control regardless of link quality.

client.title: Web app
client.description: Next.js, Konva floor plans, scenarios and dashboards with real-time updates.

useCases.title: How it works day to day
useCases.description: Typical flows the architecture was designed around.

onboard.title: Add a device — assign rights
onboard.description: An admin places hardware in a room and grants staff access only to the functions they need.

floorplan.title: Floor plan, not just a list
floorplan.description: Live status on the layout — lighting and climate in a couple of clicks.

offline.title: Internet down — site still runs
offline.description: The local server keeps processing commands; operations do not stall.

sync.title: Back online — data catches up
sync.description: Queued changes sync to the cloud automatically; every site stays current.

ai.title: AI suggests a scenario
ai.description: From connected devices — ready automation like “lights off when the last person leaves.”

multisite.title: All sites in one window
multisite.description: Switch between homes and locations without new logins or lost context.

valueProps.title: Reliability and economics that matter
valueProps.description: Smart building management can cut electricity use by 20–30% — Domovoy helps you get there without an army of integrators.

scale.title: Many sites, no chaos
scale.description: Typical scale: up to 10 locations and hundreds of devices per account, with one access policy.

integration.title: Catalog instead of manual wiring
integration.description: Type → category → device → function: new hardware is matched by model and manufacturer.

security.title: Security by default
security.description: Keycloak, effective-permission cache, and ABAC policies — predictable rules, not “everyone is admin.”

cta.title: Ready to bring your smart home to the next level?
cta.description: Open the dashboard and connect your first site — or explore the device catalog and configure access policies.

footer.description: Domovoy is a smart home platform for managing devices, automations, and access from a single console.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage your smart home system
admin.name: Name
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

roomPlanner.title: Room Planner
roomPlanner.subtitle: Create room layout and place devices
roomPlanner.selectDevice: Select a device to view properties
roomPlanner.regionDrawingHint: Click on the plan to add region vertices. Close the loop on the first point or click “Save”.
roomPlanner.selectElementHint: Select an element on the plan or a room region
roomPlanner.regionVertexHint: Vertex {{index}} of {{total}}. Drag on the plan or delete it.
roomPlanner.minVerticesHint: Minimum 3 vertices — deletion is not available.
roomPlanner.roomsMarkupDescription: Room markup mode: draw polygons by clicks, then assign a house room.
roomPlanner.regionSideHint: Click on a region side to add a vertex. Drag a vertex to move it.
roomPlanner.noRegionsHint: No regions yet. Enable “Room markup” tool and draw a polygon.
roomPlanner.name: Name
roomPlanner.dragDoorHandlesHint: 💡 Drag the green handles at the door edges to change width
roomPlanner.dragWindowHandlesHint: 💡 Drag the green handles at the window edges to change width
roomPlanner.saveConflict: Floor plan was changed in another session. Reload the page and save again.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.rolePriorityMin: Priority must not be less than 1
accessControl.deleteRoleConfirmMessage: This action cannot be undone. The role will be removed from the house.
accessControl.noRolesDescription: Create a role to assign to house members.

addDevice.title: Add device
addDevice.step1Description: Select the type and category of the device.

pairing.title: Pair Zigbee device
pairing.description: Put your Zigbee device into pairing mode, then start the search below. The bridge will allow new devices to join for the selected duration.
pairing.waitingForDevices: Waiting for a device to join…
pairing.noSocket: No Socket.IO connection to the cloud. Check {{gateway}}/socket.io/ and the Real-time status on the Devices tab.
pairing.interviewFailed: Interview failed — device may not be supported

connectedDevices.syncRequested: Device list request sent to the bridge
connectedDevices.mqttNotConnected: MQTT is not connected for this house. Configure the Zigbee2MQTT broker in house settings.

mqttBanner.title: MQTT not connected
mqttBanner.notConfigured: scenario-service needs the Zigbee2MQTT broker URL for this house. This is not the api-gateway /api/mqtt address.
mqttBanner.disconnected: Broker is configured but scenario-service cannot connect. Check CENTRAL_MQTT_* and run mqtt-bootstrap.
mqttBanner.reconnectFailed: MQTT not connected — check that the broker is reachable from the cloud server

mqttStatus.title: MQTT & real-time status
mqttStatus.localDisconnected: Local server is not connected to EMQX
mqttStatus.realtimeConnected: Socket.IO active — pairing and telemetry available

houseMqttSettings.title: House MQTT
houseMqttSettings.description: scenario-service connects to central EMQX (mqtt-gateway) for this house — not via api-gateway /api/mqtt.
houseMqttSettings.brokerHint: For cloud use central (→ mqtt://mqtt-gateway:1883 inside Docker) or mqtt://mqtt-gateway:1883. Topic prefix: houses/{houseId}/zigbee2mqtt.
houseMqttSettings.gatewayUrlWarning: Do not use api-gateway URL (/api/mqtt). Use central or mqtt://mqtt-gateway:1883.
houseMqttSettings.generateCredentialsHint: Creates an EMQX user scoped to this house and connects scenario-service.
houseMqttSettings.provisionDialogDescription: For local server (Settings → MQTT). scenario-service connects to EMQX automatically.

connectedDevices.controlNoSocket: Connect to realtime to use controls
connectedDevices.removeDeviceConfirmText: This will permanently delete the device from the system and remove it from the Zigbee coordinator. All telemetry history will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

localServer.actionsDescription: End this instance session or sign out from the frontend.
localServer.notFound: Local-server session was not found or has already ended.

serviceUnavailable.title: Scenario/device service is unavailable
serviceUnavailable.description: Failed to load devices and/or telemetry.

scenarioEditor.carefulDescription: Use only if you know what you are doing. Prefer the builder.

validation.errorStatusReadonly: ERROR status is set by the system

confirm.leaveUnsaved: You have unsaved changes. Leave the page?

builder.triggersEmpty: No triggers yet. Add at least one.
builder.actionsEmpty: No actions yet. Add at least one.

hint.deviceEvent: Runs when a device emits an event.
hint.webhook: Runs by an HTTP request with a secret token.

hint.deviceCommand: Example: turn on light, open lock.
hint.notify: Send a message to a user.
hint.httpRequest: Call an external service by URL.

hint.timeWindow: Run only within a time range.
hint.and: Runs if ALL nested conditions are true.
hint.or: Runs if ANY nested condition is true.

admin.noFunctionsForDevice: No functions available for selected device
admin.deleteWarningCategories: If device categories are linked to this type, deletion will not be possible.
admin.searchDevices: Search by code, name, serial number...
admin.deviceActiveDescription: Device is active and available for control

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
messages.requiredName: Please provide a name in at least one language

helpers.codeDeviceType: Unique device type code. Only uppercase letters, numbers and underscores. Example: LIGHTING, CLIMATE_CONTROL
helpers.codeDeviceCategory: Unique category code. Only uppercase letters, numbers and underscores
helpers.codeDevice: Unique device code for system identification
helpers.codeRoom: Unique room code for system identification
helpers.codeFunction: Function code. Only lowercase letters, numbers and underscores
helpers.codeAction: Action code. Only lowercase letters, numbers and underscores
helpers.deviceTypeSelect: Select the device type this category belongs to
helpers.deviceCategorySelect: Category determines device type and functionality
helpers.functionType: Determines whether the function can only read data, only write, or both
helpers.actionType: Type of action that will be performed by the function
helpers.payloadTemplate: JSON template of data sent to device when performing action. Can use variables: {value}, {min}, {max}
helpers.serialNumber: Device serial number as specified by manufacturer
helpers.unit: Unit of measurement for function value
helpers.name: Short name

placeholders.name: Lighting
placeholders.description: Devices for controlling lighting in the home
placeholders.descriptionEn: Devices for controlling lighting in the home
placeholders.descriptionRu: Устройства для управления освещением в доме
placeholders.descriptionCategoryRu: Энергоэффективная светодиодная лампа с возможностью управления яркостью
placeholders.descriptionCategoryEn: Energy-efficient LED lamp with brightness control
placeholders.descriptionDeviceRu: Основное освещение в гостиной, управляется через приложение
placeholders.descriptionDeviceEn: Main lighting in the living room, controlled via app
placeholders.descriptionRoomRu: Основная комната для отдыха и приема гостей
placeholders.descriptionRoomEn: Main room for relaxation and entertaining guests
